data.body: Fix applied: added HARD-GATE block at Step 4 Approval Gate enumerating required completed pipeline steps (2.5, 2.6, 2.75, 3) and clarifying that option (b)/(c) re-runs are second-pass cycles only. Reframed label-switching to make graceful-degradation skips explicit exceptions rather than normal gate entry conditions. Root cause: Positional Bias + Multi-Step Reasoning Drift — gate had no precondition blocking presentation before scrutiny ran.
